name: Blaine V2: SE
description: Blaine V2: SE — F12 TKL aluminum keyboard kit with a carbon-fiber bottom plate, triple mount system (top mount, single-sided gasket, o-ring), and a POM volcano light-diffusing element on the underside. Offered in Classic, Volcano, Seafoam, and Mystery colorways with solder or hotswap PCB options. Group buy run by CannonKeys, 2026-07-10 through 2026-08-09; estimated shipping Q1 2027.
